pr-evidence/harden-native-probe-result-b.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review approved the focused bool-hardening diff with no requested changes; reviewer ran focused engine-probe tests and noted earlier full-suite failures were only from the incomplete evidence sidecar.
scope: document_kv_cache.engine_probe, restaurant_kv_serving.engine_probe, engine probe regression tests
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_engine_probe.py::test_engine_probe_native_probe_flags_must_be_boolean -q; poetry run pytest tests/test_engine_probe.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; poetry build
what_changed: Require engine probe native_probe flags to be real booleans on public and legacy probe config/result dataclasses.
pr-evidence/harden-native-probe-result-b.why: Native probe evidence is release-gating; truthy or falsey non-bool values should fail before a probe run can be treated as native evidence.
